author: maxine--futura
content:
Plan: This is Work Package 3 (WP3) of the ecosystem coordination design (.design/ecosystem-coordination.md). Work happens in ~/code/forecast/atdata-rs repo.

Scope:
1. Implement three-tier XRPC routing in atdata/src/atmosphere/client.rs:
   - Tier 1: Configurable generic AppView (ATDATA_GENERIC_APPVIEW env, default bsky.social) for unauthenticated reads (getRecord on foreign DIDs, resolveHandle)
   - Tier 2: User PDS for authenticated ops (already done)
   - Tier 3: Configurable atdata AppView (ATDATA_APPVIEW env, already plumbed but unused) for custom science.alt.dataset.* XRPC endpoints. Start with routing infrastructure, not full endpoint implementation.
2. Add lexicon drift-detection test: parse entry.json (and other lexicon files synced via submodule), extract all property names, assert each has a corresponding field in atmosphere/lexicon.rs structs.
3. Add test vector runner: read test-vectors/ from synced lexicons, implement Rust test cases that validate shard roundtrip against expected outputs.
4. Create .atdata-ecosystem.json declaring role=sdk, language=rust, lexicon_sync method/ref, capabilities list.
5. Create .github/workflows/compat-check.yml triggered by repository_dispatch (event: lexicon-compat-check). Updates submodule ref, runs cargo test.

Acceptance criteria: AC-2, AC-3 (Rust), AC-4 (Rust runner), AC-5 (Rust), AC-7 (Rust).
Blocked by: #16 (need test vectors to exist first).
